title: An Indonesian group built for the world's shelves
intro: Sansico Group Indonesia is an internationally recognised design and solutions provider — trading agent, vendor and trusted manufacturer for some of today's most recognisable brands.
vision: To bring renewable, sustainable innovation to the global home — one gift at a time.
culture: A culture of long-term relationships: with customers measured in decades, with communities measured in livelihoods, and with the environment measured in what we give back.

timeline.event: Group manufacturing origins in Indonesia — four decades of continuous operation begin.
First US retail programmes; the long-term customer relationships that define the group take root.
Multi-facility expansion across Java; printing, packaging and handicraft capabilities scale.
Foshan Sansico extends the group to China; certifications deepen across security, social and environmental standards.
Integrated FSC rattan supply chain launched with rural artisan communities.
FSC rattan supply chain operational; NEST partnership with Target advances.
Ten facilities, three countries, 25+ global customers — and a next-generation digital supply chain in build.

innovation.title: Industry 4.0, IoT & AI
innovation.body: Collaborative digital manufacturing that has benefited billions of units.

innovation.title: Automation initiatives
innovation.body: Advanced robotics and automation for aspirational quality and cost results.

innovation.title: Process innovation
innovation.body: Continuous improvement across production and delivery to hold quality and value.

innovation.title: Circular, sustainable, renewable
innovation.body: Sustainability engineered into all products and processes.

leadership.note: Leadership profiles to be added with photography in the content phase.
